tEn: Conformer: Convolution-augmented Transformer for Speech Recognition
tZh: Conformer: 用于语音识别的卷积增强Transformer
sEn: Conformer combines CNNs and Transformers to capture both local and global dependencies, achieving state-of-the-art speech recognition results.
sZh: Conformer结合CNN和Transformer，有效捕捉局部和全局依赖，在语音识别中达到最优性能。
absEn: Recently Transformer and Convolution neural network (CNN) based models have shown promising results in Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), outperforming Recurrent neural networks (RNNs). Transformer models are good at capturing content-based global interactions, while CNNs exploit local features effectively. In this work, we achieve the best of both worlds by studying how to combine convolution neural networks and transformers to model both local and global dependencies of an audio sequence in a parameter-efficient way. To this regard, we propose the convolution-augmented transformer for speech recognition, named Conformer. Conformer significantly outperforms the previous Transformer and CNN based models achieving state-of-the-art accuracies. On the widely used LibriSpeech benchmark, our model achieves WER of 2.1%/4.3% without using a language model and 1.9%/3.9% with an external language model on test/testother. We also observe competitive performance of 2.7%/6.3% with a small model of only 10M parameters.
absZh: 最近，基于Transformer和卷积神经网络（CNN）的模型在自动语音识别（ASR）中展现出优于循环神经网络（RNN）的结果。Transformer模型擅长捕捉基于内容的全局交互，而CNN则能有效利用局部特征。在这项工作中，我们通过研究如何以参数高效的方式结合卷积神经网络和Transformer来同时建模音频序列的局部和全局依赖，实现了两全其美。为此，我们提出了用于语音识别的卷积增强Transformer，命名为Conformer。Conformer显著优于之前的Transformer和CNN模型，达到了最先进的准确率。在广泛使用的LibriSpeech基准测试中，我们的模型在未使用语言模型的情况下，在test/testother上实现了2.1%/4.3%的词错误率（WER），使用外部语言模型时达到1.9%/3.9%。我们还观察到，仅使用10M参数的小模型也取得了2.7%/6.3%的竞争性性能。

contrib.en: Proposes Conformer, combining convolution and Transformer for speech recognition.
contrib.zh: 提出Conformer，结合卷积和Transformer用于语音识别。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art WER of 1.9%/3.9% on LibriSpeech test/testother.
contrib.zh: 在LibriSpeech test/testother上达到1.9%/3.9%的词错误率，为当前最优。

contrib.en: Introduces a sandwich structure with two feed-forward modules around attention and convolution.
contrib.zh: 引入三明治结构，在注意力与卷积模块两侧放置两个前馈模块。

contrib.en: Demonstrates convolution module is critical for performance via ablation studies.
contrib.zh: 通过消融实验证明卷积模块对性能至关重要。

contrib.en: Shows parameter efficiency: 10M model achieves competitive 2.7%/6.3% WER.
contrib.zh: 展示参数效率：10M参数模型达到2.7%/6.3%的竞争性词错误率。

contrib.en: Studies effects of attention heads, kernel size, activation, and module placement.
contrib.zh: 研究注意力头数、卷积核大小、激活函数和模块放置的影响。

limits.en: Evaluation only on LibriSpeech; generalizability to other datasets unverified.
limits.zh: 仅在LibriSpeech上评估，未验证在其他数据集上的泛化性。

limits.en: Requires careful tuning of hyperparameters like kernel size and attention heads.
limits.zh: 需要仔细调整超参数，如卷积核大小和注意力头数。

limits.en: Performance with external language model may vary with LM quality.
limits.zh: 使用外部语言模型时的性能可能因语言模型质量而异。

limits.en: Computational cost of depthwise convolution may limit deployment on resource-constrained devices.
limits.zh: 深度可分离卷积的计算成本可能限制在资源受限设备上的部署。

limits.en: Study limited to speech recognition; applicability to other domains not explored.
limits.zh: 研究仅限于语音识别，未探索在其他领域的适用性。

items.en: Recently Transformer and Convolution neural network (CNN) based models have shown promising results in Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), outperforming Recurrent neural networks (RNNs). Transformer models are good at capturing content-based global interactions, while CNNs exploit local features effectively. In this work, we achieve the best of both worlds by studying how to combine convolution neural networks and transformers to model both local and global dependencies of an audio sequence in a parameter-efficient way. To this regard, we propose the convolution-augmented transformer for speech recognition, named Conformer. Conformer significantly outperforms the previous Transformer and CNN based models achieving state-of-the-art accuracies. On the widely used LibriSpeech benchmark, our model achieves WER of 2.1%/4.3% without using a language model and 1.9%/3.9% with an external language model on test/testother. We also observe competitive performance of 2.7%/6.3% with a small model of only 10M parameters.
items.zh: 最近，基于Transformer和卷积神经网络（CNN）的模型在自动语音识别（ASR）中展现出令人瞩目的结果，超越了循环神经网络（RNN）。Transformer模型擅长捕捉基于内容的全局交互，而CNN则有效利用局部特征。在这项工作中，我们通过研究如何以参数高效的方式结合卷积神经网络和Transformer来建模音频序列的局部和全局依赖，实现了两者的最佳结合。为此，我们提出了用于语音识别的卷积增强Transformer，命名为Conformer。Conformer显著优于之前的Transformer和CNN模型，达到了最先进的准确率。在广泛使用的LibriSpeech基准测试中，我们的模型在未使用语言模型的情况下，在test/testother上实现了2.1%/4.3%的词错误率（WER），在使用外部语言模型时达到1.9%/3.9%。我们还观察到，一个仅有10M参数的小模型也取得了2.7%/6.3%的竞争性表现。

items.en: Index Terms: speech recognition, attention, convolutional neural networks, transformer, end-to-end
items.zh: 索引术语：语音识别，注意力机制，卷积神经网络，Transformer，端到端

items.en: End-to-end automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems based on neural networks have seen large improvements in recent years. Recurrent neural networks (RNNs) have been the de-facto choice for ASR [1, 2, 3, 4] as they can model the temporal dependencies in the audio sequences effectively [5]. Recently, the Transformer architecture based on self-attention [6, 7] has enjoyed widespread adoption for modeling sequences due to its ability to capture long distance interactions and the high training efficiency. Alternatively, convolutions have also been successful for ASR [8, 9, 10, 11, 12], which capture local context progressively via a local receptive field layer by layer.
items.zh: 基于神经网络的端到端自动语音识别（ASR）系统近年来取得了巨大进步。循环神经网络（RNN）一直是ASR的事实选择[1, 2, 3, 4]，因为它们能有效建模音频序列中的时间依赖[5]。最近，基于自注意力机制的Transformer架构[6, 7]因其捕捉长距离交互的能力和高训练效率而在序列建模中广泛采用。另外，卷积在ASR中也取得了成功[8, 9, 10, 11, 12]，它通过局部感受野逐层渐进地捕捉局部上下文。

items.en: However, models with self-attention or convolutions each has its limitations. While Transformers are good at modeling long-range global context, they are less capable to extract fine-grained local feature patterns. Convolution neural networks (CNNs), on the other hand, exploit local information and are used as the de-facto computational block in vision. They learn shared position-based kernels over a local window which maintain translation equivariance and are able to capture features like edges and shapes. One limitation of using local connectivity is that you need many more layers or parameters to capture global information. To combat this issue, contemporary work ContextNet [10] adopts the squeeze-and-excitation module [13] in each residual block to capture longer context. However, it is still limited in capturing dynamic global context as it only applies a global averaging over the entire sequence.
items.zh: 然而，仅使用自注意力或卷积的模型各有局限性。虽然Transformer擅长建模长距离全局上下文，但它们在提取细粒度局部特征模式方面能力较弱。另一方面，卷积神经网络（CNN）利用局部信息，并作为视觉领域的事实计算模块。它们在局部窗口上学习共享的基于位置的核，保持平移等变性，并能捕捉边缘和形状等特征。局部连接的一个限制是需要更多层或参数来捕捉全局信息。为了解决这个问题，当代工作ContextNet[10]在每个残差块中采用挤压激励模块[13]来捕捉更长上下文。然而，它仍然在捕捉动态全局上下文方面有限，因为它仅对整个序列进行全局平均。

items.en: Recent works have shown that combining convolution and self-attention improves over using them individually [14]. Together, they are able to learn both position-wise local features, and use content-based global interactions. Concurrently, papers like [15, 16] have augmented self-attention with relative position based information that maintains equivariance. Wu et al. [17] proposed a multi-branch architecture with splitting the input into two branches: self-attention and convolution; and concatenating their outputs. Their work targeted mobile applications and showed improvements in machine translation tasks.
items.zh: 最近的工作表明，结合卷积和自注意力比单独使用它们有所改进[14]。它们共同能够学习位置相关的局部特征，并利用基于内容的全局交互。同时，像[15, 16]这样的论文通过相对位置信息增强了自注意力，保持了等变性。Wu等人[17]提出了一种多分支架构，将输入分成两个分支：自注意力和卷积，并拼接它们的输出。他们的工作针对移动应用，并在机器翻译任务中展示了改进。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Conformer encoder model architecture. Conformer comprises of two macaron-like feed-forward layers with half-step residual connections sandwiching the multi-headed self-attention and convolution modules. This is followed by a post layernorm.
items.capZh: 图1：Conformer编码器模型架构。Conformer包含两个马卡龙风格的前馈层，带有半步残差连接，夹着多头自注意力和卷积模块。之后是后层归一化。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Convolution module. The convolution module contains a pointwise convolution with an expansion factor of 2 projecting the number of channels with a GLU activation layer, followed by a 1-D Depthwise convolution. The 1-D depthwise conv is followed by a Batchnorm and then a swish activation layer.
items.capZh: 图2：卷积模块。卷积模块包含一个点卷积，扩展因子为2，通过GLU激活层投影通道数，然后是一个一维深度卷积。一维深度卷积之后是批归一化和swish激活层。

items.en: In this work, we study how to organically combine convolutions with self-attention in ASR models. We hypothesize that both global and local interactions are important for being parameter efficient. To achieve this, we propose a novel combination of self-attention and convolution will achieve the best of both worlds – self-attention learns the global interaction whilst the convolutions efficiently capture the relative-offset-based local correlations. Inspired by Wu et al. [17, 18], we introduce a novel combination of self-attention and convolution, sandwiched between a pair feed forward modules, as illustrated in Fig 1.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了如何在ASR模型中有机地结合卷积和自注意力。我们假设全局和局部交互对于参数效率都很重要。为了实现这一点，我们提出了一种新颖的自注意力和卷积组合，将实现两者的最佳结合——自注意力学习全局交互，而卷积有效捕捉基于相对偏移的局部相关性。受Wu等人[17, 18]的启发，我们引入了一种新颖的自注意力和卷积组合，夹在一对前馈模块之间，如图1所示。

items.en: Our proposed model, named Conformer, achieves state-of-the-art results on LibriSpeech, outperforming the previous best published Transformer Transducer [7] by 15% relative improvement on the testother dataset with an external language model. We present three models based on model parameter limit constraints of 10M , 30M and 118M. Our 10M model shows an improvement when compared to similar sized contemporary work [10] with 2.7%/6.3% on test/testother datasets. Our medium 30M parameters-sized model already outperforms transformer transducer published in [7] which uses 139M model parameters. With the big 118M parameter model, we are able to achieve 2.1%/4.3% without using language models and 1.9%/3.9% with an external language model.
items.zh: 我们提出的模型名为Conformer，在LibriSpeech上取得了最先进的结果，在使用外部语言模型的情况下，在testother数据集上比之前最佳发布的Transformer Transducer[7]相对提升了15%。我们根据模型参数限制（10M、30M和118M）展示了三个模型。我们的10M模型在test/testother数据集上以2.7%/6.3%的表现优于类似大小的当代工作[10]。我们的中等30M参数模型已经超越了[7]中发布的139M参数的Transformer Transducer。使用大模型（118M参数），我们在未使用语言模型时达到2.1%/4.3%，在使用外部语言模型时达到1.9%/3.9%。

items.en: We further carefully study the effects of the number of attention heads, convolution kernel sizes, activation functions, placement of feed-forward layers, and different strategies of adding convolution modules to a Transformer-based network, and shed light on how each contributes to the accuracy improvements.
items.zh: 我们进一步仔细研究了注意力头数、卷积核大小、激活函数、前馈层放置位置以及向基于Transformer的网络添加卷积模块的不同策略的影响，并阐明了每个因素如何促进准确率提升。

items.en: Our audio encoder first processes the input with a convolution subsampling layer and then with a number of conformer blocks, as illustrated in Figure 1. The distinctive feature of our model is the use of Conformer blocks in the place of Transformer blocks as in [7, 19].
items.zh: 我们的音频编码器首先用卷积子采样层处理输入，然后用多个Conformer块处理，如图1所示。我们模型的显著特征是在[7, 19]中使用的Transformer块位置使用了Conformer块。

items.en: A conformer block is composed of four modules stacked together, i.e, a feed-forward module, a self-attention module, a convolution module, and a second feed-forward module in the end. Sections 2.1, 1, and 2.3 introduce the self-attention, convolution, and feed-forward modules, respectively. Finally, 2.4 describes how these sub blocks are combined.
items.zh: 一个Conformer块由四个模块堆叠而成：一个前馈模块、一个自注意力模块、一个卷积模块，最后是第二个前馈模块。第2.1节、第1节和第2.3节分别介绍了自注意力、卷积和前馈模块。最后，第2.4节描述了这些子块如何组合。

items.en: We employ multi-headed self-attention (MHSA) while integrating an important technique from Transformer-XL [20], the relative sinusoidal positional encoding scheme. The relative positional encoding allows the self-attention module to generalize better on different input length and the resulting encoder is more robust to the variance of the utterance length. We use pre-norm residual units [21, 22] with dropout which helps training and regularizing deeper models. Figure 3 below illustrates the multi-headed self-attention block.
items.zh: 我们采用多头自注意力（MHSA），同时集成了Transformer-XL[20]中的一项重要技术——相对正弦位置编码方案。相对位置编码使自注意力模块在不同输入长度上具有更好的泛化能力，并且得到的编码器对话语长度的变化更加鲁棒。我们使用预归一化残差单元[21, 22]和dropout，这有助于训练和正则化更深模型。下图3展示了多头自注意力块。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Multi-Headed self-attention module. We use multi-headed self-attention with relative positional embedding in a pre-norm residual unit.
items.capZh: 图3：多头自注意力模块。我们在预归一化残差单元中使用带有相对位置嵌入的多头自注意力。

items.en: Inspired by [17], the convolution module starts with a gating mechanism [23]—a pointwise convolution and a gated linear unit (GLU). This is followed by a single 1-D depthwise convolution layer. Batchnorm is deployed just after the convolution to aid training deep models. Figure 2 illustrates the convolution block.
items.zh: 受[17]启发，卷积模块以门控机制[23]开始——一个点卷积和一个门控线性单元（GLU）。之后是一个一维深度卷积层。批归一化在卷积之后部署，以帮助训练深度模型。图2展示了卷积块。

items.en: The Transformer architecture as proposed in [6] deploys a feed forward module after the MHSA layer and is composed of two linear transformations and a nonlinear activation in between. A residual connection is added over the feed-forward layers, followed by layer normalization. This structure is also adopted by Transformer ASR models [7, 24].
items.zh: 如[6]中提出的Transformer架构在MHSA层之后部署了一个前馈模块，由两个线性变换和中间的激活函数组成。在前馈层上添加残差连接，然后进行层归一化。这种结构也被Transformer ASR模型[7, 24]采用。

items.en: We follow pre-norm residual units [21, 22] and apply layer normalization within the residual unit and on the input before the first linear layer. We also apply Swish activation [25] and dropout, which helps regularizing the network. Figure 4 illustrates the Feed Forward (FFN) module.
items.zh: 我们遵循预归一化残差单元[21, 22]，在残差单元内部和第一个线性层之前的输入上应用层归一化。我们还应用Swish激活[25]和dropout，这有助于正则化网络。图4展示了前馈（FFN）模块。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Feed forward module. The first linear layer uses an expansion factor of 4 and the second linear layer projects it back to the model dimension. We use swish activation and a pre-norm residual units in feed forward module.
items.capZh: 图4：前馈模块。第一个线性层使用扩展因子4，第二个线性层将其投影回模型维度。我们在前馈模块中使用swish激活和预归一化残差单元。

items.en: Our proposed Conformer block contains two Feed Forward modules sandwiching the Multi-Headed Self-Attention module and the Convolution module, as shown in Figure 1.
items.zh: 我们提出的Conformer块包含两个前馈模块，夹着多头自注意力模块和卷积模块，如图1所示。

items.en: This sandwich structure is inspired by Macaron-Net [18], which proposes replacing the original feed-forward layer in the Transformer block into two half-step feed-forward layers, one before the attention layer and one after. As in Macron-Net, we employ half-step residual weights in our feed-forward (FFN) modules. The second feed-forward module is followed by a final layernorm layer. Mathematically, this means, for input xisubscript𝑥𝑖x_{i} to a Conformer block i𝑖i, the output yisubscript𝑦𝑖y_{i} of the block is:
items.zh: 这种夹层结构受Macaron-Net[18]启发，该网络提出将Transformer块中的原始前馈层替换为两个半步前馈层，一个在注意力层之前，一个在之后。与Macron-Net一样，我们在前馈（FFN）模块中使用半步残差权重。第二个前馈模块之后是最终的层归一化层。数学上，对于输入x_i到Conformer块i，该块的输出y_i为：

items.en: where FFN refers to the Feed forward module, MHSA refers to the Multi-Head Self-Attention module, and Conv refers to the Convolution module as described in the preceding sections.
items.zh: 其中FFN指前馈模块，MHSA指多头自注意力模块，Conv指前面章节中描述的卷积模块。

items.en: Our ablation study discussed in Sec 3.4.3 compares the Macaron-style half-step FFNs with the vanilla FFN as used in previous works. We find that having two Macaron-net style feed-forward layers with half-step residual connections sandwiching the attention and convolution modules in between provides a significant improvement over having a single feed-forward module in our Conformer architecture.
items.zh: 我们在第3.4.3节讨论的消融研究比较了马卡龙式半步FFN与先前工作中使用的标准FFN。我们发现，在Conformer架构中，使用两个马卡龙式前馈层（带有半步残差连接）将注意力模块和卷积模块夹在中间，相比使用单个前馈模块有显著改进。

items.en: The combination of convolution and self-attention has been studied before and one can imagine many ways to achieve that. Different options of augmenting convolutions with self-attention are studied in Sec 3.4.2. We found that convolution module stacked after the self-attention module works best for speech recognition.
items.zh: 卷积和自注意力的组合之前已有研究，并且可以想象有许多实现方式。第3.4.2节研究了用自注意力增强卷积的不同选项。我们发现，在自注意力模块之后堆叠卷积模块对语音识别效果最佳。

items.en: We evaluate the proposed model on the LibriSpeech [26] dataset, which consists of 970 hours of labeled speech and an additional 800M word token text-only corpus for building language model. We extracted 80-channel filterbanks features computed from a 25ms window with a stride of 10ms. We use SpecAugment [27, 28] with mask parameter (F=27𝐹27F=27), and ten time masks with maximum time-mask ratio (pS=0.05subscript𝑝𝑆0.05p_{S}=0.05), where the maximum-size of the time mask is set to pSsubscript𝑝𝑆p_{S} times the length of the utterance.
items.zh: 我们在LibriSpeech [26]数据集上评估所提出的模型，该数据集包含970小时带标签的语音和额外的800M词元文本语料库用于构建语言模型。我们提取了80通道滤波器组特征，这些特征由25ms窗口以10ms步长计算得出。我们使用SpecAugment [27, 28]，掩码参数F=27，以及十个时间掩码，最大时间掩码比pS=0.05，其中时间掩码的最大尺寸设置为pS乘以话语长度。

items.en: We identify three models, small, medium and large, with 10M, 30M, and 118M params, respectively, by sweeping different combinations of network depth, model dimensions, number of attention heads and choosing the best performing one within model parameter size constraints. We use a single-LSTM-layer decoder in all our models. Table 1 describes their architecture hyper-parameters.
items.zh: 我们通过扫描网络深度、模型维度、注意力头数的不同组合，并在模型参数大小约束内选择性能最佳的模型，确定了三个模型：小、中、大，分别有10M、30M和118M参数。我们所有模型均使用单层LSTM解码器。表1描述了它们的架构超参数。

items.en: For regularization, we apply dropout [29] in each residual unit of the conformer, i.e, to the output of each module, before it is added to the module input. We use a rate of Pd​r​o​p=0.1subscript𝑃𝑑𝑟𝑜𝑝0.1P_{drop}=0.1. Variational noise [5, 30] is introduced to the model as a regularization. A ℓ2subscriptℓ2\ell_{2} regularization with 1​e−61𝑒61e-6 weight is also added to all the trainable weights in the network. We train the models with the Adam optimizer [31] with β1=0.9subscript𝛽10.9\beta_{1}=0.9, β2=0.98subscript𝛽20.98\beta_{2}=0.98 and ϵ=10−9italic-ϵsuperscript109\epsilon=10^{-9} and a transformer learning rate schedule [6], with 10k warm-up steps and peak learning rate 0.05/𝐝0.05𝐝0.05/\sqrt{\bf{d}} where 𝐝𝐝\bf{d} is the model dimension in conformer encoder.
items.zh: 对于正则化，我们在Conformer的每个残差单元中应用dropout [29]，即在每个模块的输出上、在将其加到模块输入之前，使用dropout率P_drop=0.1。我们还引入变分噪声[5, 30]作为正则化。此外，对所有可训练权重添加权重为1e-6的ℓ2正则化。我们使用Adam优化器[31]训练模型，β1=0.9，β2=0.98，ϵ=10^{-9}，并采用Transformer学习率调度[6]，包含10k步预热，峰值学习率为0.05/√d，其中d是Conformer编码器中的模型维度。

items.en: We use a 3-layer LSTM language model (LM) with width 4096 trained on the LibriSpeech langauge model corpus with the LibriSpeech960h transcripts added, tokenized with the 1k WPM built from LibriSpeech 960h. The LM has word-level perplexity 63.9 on the dev-set transcripts. The LM weight λ𝜆\lambda for shallow fusion is tuned on the dev-set via grid search. All models are implemented with Lingvo toolkit [32].
items.zh: 我们使用一个3层LSTM语言模型（LM），宽度为4096，在LibriSpeech语言模型语料库上训练，并加入了LibriSpeech 960h转录文本，使用从LibriSpeech 960h构建的1k WPM进行分词。该语言模型在开发集转录上的词级困惑度为63.9。通过网格搜索在开发集上调整浅融合的语言模型权重λ。所有模型均使用Lingvo工具包[32]实现。

items.en: Without a language model, the performance of our medium model already achieve competitive results of 2.32.32.3/5.05.05.0 on test/testother outperforming the best known Transformer, LSTM based model, or a similar sized convolution model. With the language model added, our model achieves the lowest word error rate among all the existing models. This clearly demonstrates the effectiveness of combining Transformer and convolution in a single neural network.
items.zh: 在没有语言模型的情况下，我们的中等模型在test/testother上已经取得了具有竞争力的结果2.3/5.0，优于已知的最佳Transformer、基于LSTM的模型或类似规模的卷积模型。加入语言模型后，我们的模型在所有现有模型中取得了最低的词错误率。这清楚地证明了在单个神经网络中结合Transformer和卷积的有效性。

items.en: A Conformer block differs from a Transformer block in a number of ways, in particular, the inclusion of a convolution block and having a pair of FFNs surrounding the block in the Macaron-style. Below we study these effects of these differences by mutating a Conformer block towards a Transformer block, while keeping the total number of parameters unchanged. Table 3 shows the impact of each change to the Conformer block. Among all differences, convolution sub-block is the most important feature, while having a Macaron-style FFN pair is also more effective than a single FFN of the same number of parameters. Using swish activations led to faster convergence in the Conformer models.
items.zh: Conformer块与Transformer块在多个方面不同，特别是包含卷积块以及马卡龙式地使用一对FFN包围该块。下面我们通过将Conformer块向Transformer块变异，同时保持总参数数量不变，来研究这些差异的影响。表3显示了每个变化对Conformer块的影响。在所有差异中，卷积子块是最重要的特征，而使用马卡龙式FFN对也比相同参数数量的单个FFN更有效。使用swish激活函数使Conformer模型收敛更快。

items.en: We study the effects of various different ways of combining the multi-headed self-attention (MHSA) module with the convolution module. First, we try replacing the depthwise convolution in the convolution module with a lightweight convolution [35], see a significant drop in the performance especially on the dev-other dataset. Second, we study placing the convolution module before the MHSA module in our Conformer model and find that it degrades the results by 0.1 on dev-other. Another possible way of the architecture is to split the input into parallel branches of multi-headed self attention module and a convolution module with their output concatenated as suggested in [17]. We found that this worsens the performance when compared to our proposed architecture.
items.zh: 我们研究了将多头自注意力（MHSA）模块与卷积模块以不同方式组合的效果。首先，我们尝试将卷积模块中的深度可分离卷积替换为轻量卷积[35]，发现性能显著下降，尤其是在dev-other数据集上。其次，我们研究将卷积模块放在Conformer模型中的MHSA模块之前，发现这使dev-other上的结果下降了0.1。另一种可能的架构是将输入分成多头自注意力模块和卷积模块的并行分支，并将它们的输出拼接起来，如[17]所建议。我们发现，与我们的提议架构相比，这降低了性能。

items.en: These results in Table 4 suggest the advantage of placing the convolution module after the self-attention module in the Conformer block.
items.zh: 表4中的结果表明，在Conformer块中将卷积模块放在自注意力模块之后具有优势。

items.en: Instead of a single feed-forward module (FFN) post the attention blocks as in the Transformer models, the Conformer block has a pair of macaron-like Feed forward modules sandwiching the self-attention and convolution modules. Further, the Conformer feed forward modules are used with half-step residuals. Table 5 shows the impact of changing the Conformer block to use a single FFN or full-step residuals.
items.zh: 与Transformer模型中注意力块之后只有一个前馈模块（FFN）不同，Conformer块有一对马卡龙式前馈模块，夹住自注意力和卷积模块。此外，Conformer前馈模块使用半步残差。表5显示了将Conformer块改为使用单个FFN或全步残差的影响。

items.en: In self-attention, each attention head learns to focus on different parts of the input, making it possible to improve predictions beyond the simple weighted average. We perform experiments to study the effect of varying the number of attention heads from 444 to 323232 in our large model, using the same number of heads in all layers. We find that increasing attention heads up to 161616 improves the accuracy, especially over the devother datasets, as shown in Table 6.
items.zh: 在自注意力中，每个注意力头学习关注输入的不同部分，从而有可能改进预测，超越简单的加权平均。我们进行实验，研究在大模型中从头数从4变化到32的效果，所有层使用相同数量的头。我们发现，将注意力头数增加到16可以提高准确率，尤其是在dev-other数据集上，如表6所示。

items.en: To study the effect of kernel sizes in the depthwise convolution, we sweep the kernel size in {3,7,17,32,65}37173265\{3,7,17,32,65\} of the large model, using the same kernel size for all layers. We find that the performance improves with larger kernel sizes till kernel sizes 171717 and 323232 but worsens in the case of kernel size 656565, as show in Table 7. On comparing the second decimal in dev WER, we find kernel size 32 to perform better than rest.
items.zh: 为了研究深度可分离卷积中卷积核大小的影响，我们在大型模型中扫描卷积核大小{3,7,17,32,65}，所有层使用相同的卷积核大小。我们发现，性能随着卷积核大小增大而提升，直到卷积核大小17和32，但在卷积核大小65时性能下降，如表7所示。比较开发集WER的第二位小数，我们发现卷积核大小32优于其他。

items.en: In this work, we introduced Conformer, an architecture that integrates components from CNNs and Transformers for end-to-end speech recognition. We studied the importance of each component, and demonstrated that the inclusion of convolution modules is critical to the performance of the Conformer model. The model exhibits better accuracy with fewer parameters than previous work on the LibriSpeech dataset, and achieves a new state-of-the-art performance at 1.9%percent1.91.9\%/3.9%percent3.93.9\% for test/testother.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们介绍了Conformer，一种将CNN和Transformer组件集成用于端到端语音识别的架构。我们研究了每个组件的重要性，并证明了包含卷积模块对Conformer模型的性能至关重要。该模型在LibriSpeech数据集上以更少的参数取得了比先前工作更好的准确率，并在test/testother上达到了1.9%/3.9%的新最优性能。
